text: Here's what science actually says about monoclonal antibodies. Monoclonal antibodies are lab-made proteins designed to mimic immune system functions. They target specific pathogens, making them powerful tools against diseases. Recent studies show their effectiveness in treating conditions like COVID-19 and cancer. However, ongoing research is crucial; outcomes aren’t guaranteed for everyone. Stay curious and follow for more science insights!
